keySentences: What did you do this morning?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: What did you do this morning?

cloze.question:
A: _______________ this morning?
B: I attended a speech.

memoryTechniques.title: 场景联想
memoryTechniques.description: 想象你早上去了学校，妈妈问你：'What did you do this morning?'（你今天早上做了什么？），你回答：'I attended a speech.'（我参加了一个演讲。）

memoryTechniques.title: 关键词记忆
memoryTechniques.description:
attend = 参加（不是'出席'，而是'去参加某个活动'）
speech = 演讲（注意不是speak，speak是'说话'，speech是'演讲'）

memoryTechniques.title: 语法提示
memoryTechniques.description:
What did you do...? = 过去时态的疑问句
助动词did + 动词原形do
回答时用过去时态：I attended（attend的过去式）

keySentences: Can you give me some advice?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: Can you give me some advice?

cloze.question:
A: Can you give me some advice?
B: _______________.

memoryTechniques.title: 场景联想
memoryTechniques.description: 想象你在做作业时遇到难题，问同学：'Can you give me some advice?'（你能给我一些建议吗？），同学回答：'Sure/No problem.'（当然可以/没问题。）

memoryTechniques.title: 关键词记忆
memoryTechniques.description:
advice = 建议（不可数名词，不能说an advice）
give advice = 给建议
ask for advice = 寻求建议

memoryTechniques.title: 常用表达
memoryTechniques.description:
Sure = 当然（最简单的肯定回答）
No problem = 没问题（表示愿意帮忙）
还可以说：Of course. / Certainly.

keySentences: What difficulty do you have in your learning?
I can hardly remember any new words.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: What difficulty do you have in your learning?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: I can hardly remember any new words.

cloze.question:
A: ______________________ in your learning?
B: I can hardly remember any new words.

memoryTechniques.title: 场景联想
memoryTechniques.description: 想象你在英语考试前，朋友问你：'What difficulty do you have in your learning?'（你在学习方面有什么困难？），你诚实回答：'I can hardly remember any new words.'（我几乎记不住任何新单词。）

memoryTechniques.title: 关键词记忆
memoryTechniques.description:
difficulty = 困难（have difficulty in doing sth = 做某事有困难）
hardly = 几乎不（否定词，不是'困难'的意思）
remember = 记住（re + member = 再次成为成员 = 记住）

memoryTechniques.title: 语法提示
memoryTechniques.description:
have difficulty in (doing) sth = 在某事上有困难
hardly = 几乎不（表示否定，如：I can hardly... = 我几乎不能...）
any new words = 任何新单词（any用于否定句和疑问句）

keySentences: Please tell me as soon as you finish your homework.
No problem. Before I leave home, I will call you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.text: Please tell me as soon as you finish your homework.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: No problem. Before I leave home, I will call you.

cloze.question:
A: Please tell me as soon as you finish your homework.
B: _______________. Before I leave home, I will call you.

memoryTechniques.title: 场景联想
memoryTechniques.description: 想象你和朋友约好一起玩游戏，你告诉他：'Please tell me as soon as you finish your homework.'（你一做完作业就告诉我。）朋友回答：'No problem. Before I leave home, I will call you.'（没问题。在我离开家之前，我会打电话给你。）

memoryTechniques.title: 关键词记忆
memoryTechniques.description:
as soon as = 一...就...（引导时间状语从句）
finish = 完成（finish doing sth = 完成某事）
Before... = 在...之前（引导时间状语从句）

memoryTechniques.title: 语法提示
memoryTechniques.description:
as soon as + 句子 = 一...就...
时态：主将从现（主句用将来时，从句用现在时）
例：I will call you as soon as I finish my homework.

keySentences: I'm making a mind map about sports.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.text: I'm making a mind map about sports.

cloze.question:
A: _______________?
B: I'm making a mind map about sports.

memoryTechniques.title: 场景联想
memoryTechniques.description: 想象你在图书馆，朋友走过来问：'What are you doing?'（你在做什么？），你展示你的笔记本：'I'm making a mind map about sports.'（我正在制作一个关于体育的思维导图。）

memoryTechniques.title: 关键词记忆
memoryTechniques.description:
make a mind map = 制作思维导图（make不是'做'，是'制作'）
mind map = 思维导图（帮助记忆和整理思路的工具）
about sports = 关于体育（about = 关于）

memoryTechniques.title: 语法提示
memoryTechniques.description:
What are you doing? = 现在进行时疑问句
be动词(am/is/are) + 主语 + 动词ing
回答：I'm (动词ing)... = 我正在...
